name: United States withdrawal from the Iran nuclear deal
snippet: The United States announced its withdrawal from the Iran nuclear deal , formally known as the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA), on 8 May 2018.

name: U.S. Sanctions on Iran
snippet: 19 Aug 2025 — US s anctions on Iran block Iranian government assets in the United States, ban nearly all US trade with Iran, and prohibit foreign assistance and arms sales.

name: What was in the Iran nuclear deal and why did Trump withdraw
